Subject: Introducing J2EE training from AppDev.
Message:
Developing Enterprise Applications using the Java language is not for the
weak at heart. What application server should you choose? Which tools should
you develop in?

AppDev's new self-study "Java 2 Enterprise Edition" (J2EE) training course -
featuring industry expert Campbell Gunn - will answer these questions and
more as you learn to create robust enterprise applications using Java. Visit
http://www.appdev.com/promo/EB00059 or read on to learn more about our J2EE
course and how you can save 25%!

In this course, you will learn to:
** Understand the tools and technologies of the Java 2 Enterprise Edition
Software Development Kit (SDK).
** Understand how to design and implement an Enterprise Application using
the Java 2 Language.
** Use the tools within the SDK to provide rapid development and deployment.
** Understand the characteristics of what makes an enterprise application
scalable, reliable, and secure.
** Use techniques such as transaction management, packaging and deployment.
** Understand how the J2EE platform can support multiple operating systems,
such as Red Hat Linux and Microsoft's Windows 2000 Server products.
** And more!

Visit http://www.appdev.com/promo/EB00059 to view a detailed course outline.
